response.justification: The candidate has a strong background in software development, but lacks direct experience in SoC and IP modeling, performance analysis for AI accelerators, and hardware-software co-design.
strengths: Strong experience with various programming languages and technologies
Proven ability to work on diverse projects and technologies
Experience with open-source projects and contributions
concerns: Lack of direct experience in SoC and IP modeling
No clear experience in AI/deep-learning workload expertise
Not directly related to the required skills and technologies
